title: angolluma baldratii
intro: Angolluma baldratii is a succulent plant native to the Canary Islands, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Angolluma baldratii include the potential treatment of skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as the management of gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Angolluma baldratii are typically made by drying the plant's leaves and stems, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
